narrative:
Oakwood-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 394 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 56.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 51.5 percentage points.
